---
description: "Use when implementing character visual controllers, directional animation mapping, sprite sorting, and damage/cast feedback visuals."
name: "Character Visuals"
argument-hint: "Describe visual behavior or bug to implement/fix"
agent: "agent"
---
Implement or debug character visual behavior.

## Requirements
- Use 8-direction animation naming.
- Resolve equipment visuals through Sprite Library categories and labels.
- Keep anchors stable (`WeaponAttach`, `Muzzle`, `HeadAttach`, `BackAttach`).
- Separate visuals from gameplay colliders and state logic.

## Output
1. Visual contract checks.
2. Proposed implementation changes.
3. Animator/state mapping details.
4. Sorting and layering notes.
5. Validation checklist.
